title: BranchDistanceMatrix
description: Pairwise distance matrix over branch variants for one target quantity (M46). Entry [i,j] = |Q(branch_i) - Q(branch_j)|.

targetQuantityId.description: Target quantity ID this matrix measures.

branchVariantIds.description: Ordered list of branch variant IDs (row/column labels).

quantityValues.description: Raw quantity values per branch variant.

distances.description: Flat row-major N×N distance matrix. Entry [i*N+j] = |Q(i) - Q(j)|.

maxDistance.description: Maximum pairwise distance across the branch family.
